description_long: This advertising board features a life-sized cutout of a smiling woman dressed in a traditional Bavarian-style outfit, holding a tray with three large mugs of beer. The main panel below her displays colorful printed advertisements in Russian, promoting a beer establishment with images of beer, food, and a menu. The board is supported by a black metal frame with two horizontal stabilizing bars at the base, ensuring it stands upright on flat surfaces. The reverse side is plain, showing the structural support and silhouette of the cutout, with no visible advertising content. The materials appear to be a combination of printed plastic or laminated board for the graphics and a sturdy metal frame for support. The overall design is eye-catching and intended to attract attention in busy pedestrian areas.
description: A freestanding advertising board with a life-sized cutout of a woman in Bavarian attire holding beer, supported by a black metal frame and featuring colorful printed ads in Russian.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed cutout of a woman in costume holding beer and the full printed advertisement panel with text and images.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the board and the black metal support frame with horizontal stabilizers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the board, the silhouette of the cutout, and the supporting frame structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the thinness and support structure of the frame.
attribute_frame_design: thin black metal frame with horizontal stabilizing bars
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed poster for a beer establishment with images, menu, and promotional text in Russian
